missions.title: The Alphabetic Code
missions.task:
Decode the secret numbers below using a standard alphabet grid where A=1, B=2, C=3, etc. Once decoded, your team must immediately perform the action stated by the hidden words!

19-9-14-7 / 19-20-15 / 12-1-20 / 19-15-14-7 / 9-14 / 16-15-12-9-19-8

PROOF REQUIRED: A photo of the fully decoded phrase AND a video of your team successfully executing the action.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 2: THE PARAMOUNT LIVE STAGE

Think of flashing lights, massive crowds, and roaring speakers. Seek out the Paramount live music festival area to discover where the next stage of your journey begins.

missions.title: Meme Recreation
missions.task:
Recreate a famous internet meme using your own bodies and facial expressions, or invent a brand-new funny one on the spot.

PROOF REQUIRED: A photo or video capturing your team perfectly mimicking or creating the meme.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 3: THE LAKESIDE BEEHIVE

Follow the water's edge to a place where things are buzzing. Look for the bees' home right down by the lake to find your hidden clue.

missions.title: Run for Water
missions.task:
Fill the provided bowl to the very top with water. Rule: You are strictly forbidden from moving the bowl - the bowl has to stay in the place where you found the task! You must use the tools around you to bring the water to it.

PROOF REQUIRED: A short video showing your water transportation method and a clear shot of the completely filled bowl.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 4: THE GYM AREA

Time to break a sweat! Head over to the fitness and gym zone where strength is built. Your next task is waiting near the equipment.

missions.title: Wildlife Documentarians
missions.task:
Explore your surroundings and find 5 completely different types of animals (for example: birds, bugs, squirrels, ducks, or fish).

PROOF REQUIRED: Clear photos or videos documenting all 5 different animals.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 5: THE HOTEL GROUNDS

Where travelers rest and guests check-in. Navigate your way over to the hotel area and scout the main grounds to uncover your next target.

missions.title: The Natural Bouquet
missions.task:
Become a master florist! Scavenge the immediate area to gather and create a beautiful bouquet using at least 6 completely different types of flowers.

PROOF REQUIRED: No photo needed on the spot! Your team must physically bring and present this beautiful bouquet to Klaudia at the finish line at the end of the game.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 6: THE STORAGE ROOM

Where old secrets and extra gear are safely locked away. Venture into the designated storage room to locate the hidden next task.

missions.title: The Logic Crossword
missions.task:
Work together as a team to solve this custom crossword puzzle. Every single answer is based on trivia, facts, and secrets about Klaudia! The layout for this task is provided on paper or from the Crossword.png file given to your team.

PROOF REQUIRED: A photo of the completely filled-out crossword grid.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 7: THE 5TH FLOOR VIEW

It is time to elevate your perspective. Make your way to the highest point of view around, climb up to the 5th-floor vantage point and look out over everything!

missions.title: Synchronized Choreography
missions.task:
Design and perform a synchronized 20-second dance routine. Every single team member must do the exact same movements at the exact same time.

PROOF REQUIRED: A continuous 20-second video of your flawless, synchronized group performance.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 8: THE NEXT SNAPSHOT

Your next destination cannot be described in words. Look closely at the photo provided to your team, your eyes will show you exactly where you need to head next.

missions.title: The Delicate Tower
missions.task:
Build a freestanding tower using materials you are provided with or the ones you will find around you. The tower should be at least 0.5 meters tall. It must stand completely on its own without anyone touching it.

PROOF REQUIRED: A video showing the tower standing entirely unsupported while your team counts out loud to 7 seconds.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 9: THE PARCEL LOCKERS

A special delivery is waiting for you, but it doesn't come via mail. Find the package delivery box Locker to retrieve your next envelope.

missions.title: Object Transportation
missions.task:
Move a small object through the entire red carpet from the beginning of it until the entrance to the musicon. Rule: No hands allowed! You must work together to pass it from person to person across the distance.

PROOF REQUIRED: A video showing your continuous, hands-free transport of the object.
missions.next_hint:
RIDDLE DIRECTION 10: THE DJ SPOT

Where beats drop and the volume rises! Head straight to the designated DJ area where the music controls the crowd. Your next challenge awaits behind the decks.

missions.title: Ode to Klaudia
missions.task:
Write a rhyming birthday poem dedicated to Klaudia. It must be at least 50 words long.

PROOF REQUIRED: A video of one team member dramatically reciting the full 50-word poem to the camera.

Then race to the finish line with your bouquet (Task 5) and any other items for the final celebration!
missions.next_hint: All missions complete! Race back to the admin / finish line with your bouquet from Task 5 and any other physical items. Find the Gamemaster for final scoring and the big reveal!
